loading.preparingDownload: Please wait while we prepare your download...

home.welcomeTagline: AI-powered documentation for code, websites, and offline archives
home.description: Generate comprehensive wikis from GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket repositories, local folders, ZIM archives, or any live website -- with an optional built-in security scan (dependency CVEs, secrets, SAST, and deep website vulnerability scanning) for repos and sites alike.
home.enterRepoUrl: Enter a repository URL, a local folder path, or a website URL:
home.diagramDescription: HackDeepWiki automatically generates interactive diagrams to help you understand code structure and relationships:

form.comprehensiveDescription: Detailed wiki with structured sections and more pages
form.conciseDescription: Simplified wiki with fewer pages and essential information
form.pageCountHelp: Choose between {min} and {max} pages. Comprehensive defaults to 10 and concise to 5.
form.addTokens: + Add access tokens for private repositories
form.tokenSecurityNote: Token is stored in memory only and never persisted.
form.defaultFiltersInfo: Default filters include common directories like node_modules, .git, and common build artifact files.
form.excludedDirsHelp: One directory path per line. Paths starting with ./ are relative to repository root.
form.enterExcludedDirs: Enter excluded directories, one per line...
form.excludedFilesHelp: One filename per line. Wildcards (*) are supported.
form.enterExcludedFiles: Enter excluded files, one per line...
form.defaultNote: These defaults are already applied. Add your custom exclusions above.
form.enterIncludedDirs: Enter included directories, one per line...
form.enterIncludedFiles: Enter included files, one per line...
form.excludeModeDescription: Specify paths to exclude from processing (default behavior)
form.includeModeDescription: Specify only the paths to include, ignoring all others
form.authorizationRequired: Authentication is required to generate the wiki.
form.fanwikiErrorPath: Please provide an absolute path to a MediaWiki export XML.
form.fanwikiRegisterError: Import finished, but failed to register the wiki.

footer.copyright: HackDeepWiki - AI-powered documentation for code repositories

diagram.title: Diagram view
diagram.syntaxError: The diagram contains invalid Mermaid syntax and could not be rendered.

ask.title: Repository chat
ask.placeholder: Ask a question about this repository...
ask.deleteChatConfirm: Delete this chat and its complete history?
ask.emptyConversation: Ask a question to start this conversation.

repoPage.confirmDeleteRelease: Delete wiki release v{version}? This cannot be undone.
repoPage.errorMessageDefault: Please check that your repository exists and is public. Valid formats are "owner/repo", "https://github.com/owner/repo", "https://gitlab.com/owner/repo", "https://bitbucket.org/owner/repo", or local folder paths like "C:\\path\\to\\folder" or "/path/to/folder".
repoPage.embeddingErrorDefault: This error is related to the document embedding system used for analyzing your repository. Please verify your embedding model configuration, API keys, and try again. If the issue persists, consider switching to a different embedding provider in the model settings.
repoPage.exportAsObsidianHint: Download the whole selected wiki release as an Obsidian vault (.zip)
repoPage.selectPagePrompt: Select a page from the navigation to view its content
repoPage.editInstructionPlaceholder: Tell the AI what to change (optional)...
repoPage.attachImagesPathError: Please enter an image folder path.
repoPage.modelTimeoutError: Model stopped responding (no new data for 5 minutes).
repoPage.modelTimeoutRetryError: Model stopped responding (no new data for 5 minutes). Try generating again.
repoPage.modelNoPagesError: The model did not return any pages for this wiki. Try generating again.
repoPage.backendConnectionError: Connection to the HackDeepWiki backend was interrupted. The repository is valid; try generating again.
repoPage.analysisConnectionError: The connection to the service was interrupted during analysis. You can try again without changing the repository URL.
repoPage.generationErrorRetry: The repository or site was read successfully; the problem occurred generating content with the AI model. Try again -- changing the model or reducing the number of pages may also help.

projects.title: Processed Wiki Projects
projects.searchPlaceholder: Search projects by name, owner, or repository...
projects.noProjects: No projects found in the server cache. The cache might be empty or the server encountered an issue.
projects.noSearchResults: No projects match your search criteria.

fanwiki.initialRepairNote: Initial repair runs automatically on import.
fanwiki.addImagesDesc: Select a local folder. Images referenced by the XML will be copied and articles updated.
